name: Think and Grow Rich
tagline: The 1937 classic that turned desire into fortune for millions.
theme: vintage art-deco wealth — emerald-black, antique gold foil, cream parchment
product: Think and Grow Rich by Napoleon Hill — the landmark personal-success book, sold via Amazon
styleSignature: vintage art-deco luxury illustration, 1937 Gilded-Age wealth aesthetic, antique gold foil line-work with geometric sunburst and fan motifs, set on deep emerald-black (#0B130E) and warm cream parchment (#F4EAD2), rich antique gold (#C9A24B) with soft engraved metallic sheen and fine bevel highlights, subtle paper grain and ornamental deco geometry, refined museum-quality engraving, dramatic warm gallery lighting. No text, no words, no letters.

engines.icons: fal:fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1-ultra -> fal.py bg -> imgkit alpha (art-deco gold emblems, one shared descriptor)
engines.buttons: fal:fal-ai/ideogram/v3 (embossed antique-gold art-deco pill, engraved lettering, no candy-gloss)
engines.logo: fal:fal-ai/ideogram/v3 -> fal.py bg (gold deco monogram + wordmark lockup)

buttonColor: embossed antique-gold deco pill with engraved lettering
layoutNotes: EDITORIAL / long-form archetype (distinct from cinematic/bento/giveaway/VSL siblings). No video, no host widget (both optional in this kit). Sticky deco nav; literary hero with floating book cover + gold sunburst; proof stat strip with count-ups; Carnegie origin story split with Hill's vintage portrait (duotone); the 13 principles editorial list + 6 pillar deco icons; big gold pull-quote band; what's inside; reader acclaim with gold deco stars; buy/offer with book cover + ONE image CTA reading 'BUY ON AMAZON' (reused at final CTA); FAQ; final CTA + footer. Gold-foil dividers between bands. No emojis, no invented SVG icon art.
